topic.name: 气候、环境与公共安全
topic.description: 追踪极端天气、灾害、公共卫生与环境政策
topic.query: climate environment disaster public safety health emergency

overview: 今日专题“气候、环境与公共安全”。共筛选 23 个高价值事件，重点关注中国相关进展、美国相关进展及全球外交、经济与安全动态。

featured.title: India tunnel disaster at hydropower project leaves 11 dead, 14 missing
featured.summary: A suspected gas explosion on Monday triggered a collapse inside a tunnel that was under construction at a hydropower project in India’s northeastern Himalayan state of Sikkim, leaving at least 11 people dead and 14 missing, officials said on Tuesday. State Chief Minister Prem Singh Tamang, who visited the disaster site near the Chinese border, said the explosion was triggered by a build-up of methane gas. At least 27 people were trapped, including some who entered the tunnel to help with rescue...
tags: 专题·气候、环境与公共安全
featured.titleZh: 印度水电项目隧道灾难造成11人死亡，14人失踪
featured.summaryZh: 印度锡金邦一处在建水电项目隧道因甲烷气体堆积引发爆炸并坍塌。目前救援工作仍在进行，事故已造成重大人员伤亡。
featured.whyImportant: 该事故暴露了大型基础设施建设中的安全隐患及地质灾害风险管理问题。

featured.title: China’s policy playbook took its EV sector from zero to hero – can other countries follow?
featured.summary: China’s electric vehicle (EV) industry sits at the centre of numerous economic and geopolitical trends: consumer spending, environmental protection, trade policy, high-end manufacturing, technology and more. In this short series, we assess the current state of the sector within these broader contexts. Here, Yeon Woo Lee asks whether Beijing has written a blueprint for developing countries to kick-start their own contenders in the field. Emerging markets once seemed like also-rans in the global...
tags: 专题·气候、环境与公共安全
featured.titleZh: 中国的政策蓝图助力电动汽车行业崛起，其他国家能否效仿？
featured.summaryZh: 中国电动汽车行业的成功得益于多方面的政策支持。目前全球正关注中国模式是否能为其他发展中国家提供产业升级的参考路径。
featured.whyImportant: 中国在电动汽车领域的领先地位正促使各国重新评估其产业政策和全球贸易战略。

featured.title: Wreckage of Pan Am plane found decades after crash that changed aviation safety
featured.summary: Searchers have found the wreckage from a Pan Am flight that plunged into the ocean off Puerto Rico in 1952, an accident that killed 52 and led to requirements for the passenger safety briefings given on every commercial flight. The plane, the Clipper Endeavor, made a hard landing after losing engine power shortly after take-off. The 17 passengers and crew who survived told investigators everyone lived through the landing, but panic set in as many passengers struggled to find life vests and the...
tags: 专题·气候、环境与公共安全
featured.titleZh: 泛美航空客机残骸在坠毁数十年后被发现，该事故曾改变航空安全标准
featured.summaryZh: 搜寻人员发现了1952年在波多黎各附近海域坠毁的泛美航空客机残骸。该事故造成52人死亡，并直接推动了现代商业航班乘客安全简报制度的建立。
featured.whyImportant: 这一发现揭开了航空史上重要事故的真相，并提醒人们航空安全规范的演变历程。

featured.title: Leopard caught on camera storming into a store in Rajasthan, India
featured.summary: A leopard storms into a store in Rajasthan, India, attacking an employee and causing panic.
tags: 专题·气候、环境与公共安全
featured.titleZh: 印度拉贾斯坦邦一家商店内豹子闯入监控画面曝光
featured.summaryZh: 印度拉贾斯坦邦一家商店突然闯入一只豹子，袭击了一名员工并引发恐慌。目前相关部门正在处理此类野生动物进入人类居住区的事件。
featured.whyImportant: 该事件反映了野生动物栖息地减少导致的人兽冲突问题日益突出。

featured.title: Hong Kong surpasses July rainfall in just 20 days – why?
featured.summary: Hong Kong’s rainfall so far this month has already surpassed typical levels for July by 23 per cent, a review of Observatory data shows, with a meteorologist warning the city will experience more extreme downpours due to global warming. The Observatory also said on Tuesday that Hong Kong would be hit by rainstorms again over the weekend following weeks of heavy rain as a tropical cyclone neared the city. A South China Morning Post reporter reviewed the forecaster’s data and found the city...
tags: 专题·气候、环境与公共安全
featured.titleZh: 香港20天内降雨量超7月平均值，原因何在？
featured.summaryZh: 香港本月降雨量已比往年7月平均水平高出23%。气象专家警告，受全球变暖影响，未来极端暴雨天气将更加频繁。
featured.whyImportant: 气候变化带来的极端天气正对城市基础设施和公共安全提出严峻挑战。

global.title: Australia news live: Brittany Higgins accuses Hanson of victim-blaming in ‘atrocious’ comments on domestic violence
global.summary: Follow today’s news live Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast The New South Wales premier, Chris Minns, says the state’s Labor party is under threat from One Nation and “we’ve got to fight for those votes”. Appearing on ABC Radio National this morning, Minns was asked if One Nation was a “racist party”. He said people who had concerns about the levels of immigration weren’t necessarily racist but some of the things Pauline Hanson had said were. Certainly some of the things Pauline Hanson says are definitely racist, when she said there’s no such thing as a good Muslim. I mean, how else do you characterise that? You’ve got to be straight with people. And that clearly is. But I don’t think everyone who’s supporting them currently is racist at all … And we’ve got to fight for those votes. I think that we are under threat in a whole bunch of seats as a result of the surge of votes for One Nation … So we’re doing some what we regard as practical commonsense changes to policy in New South Wales. When people join the Do Not Call Register or unsubscribe from marketing messages, they are making a clear choice. Those choices must be respected – especially given the heig
global.titleZh: 澳大利亚新闻直播：布列塔尼·希金斯指责汉森在家庭暴力问题上的“恶劣”言论是受害者有罪论
global.summaryZh: 新南威尔士州州长克里斯·明斯表示，工党正面临“一族党”的选票威胁，必须积极争取选民。明斯指出，虽然并非所有支持该党的人都是种族主义者，但宝琳·汉森的部分言论确实带有明显的种族主义色彩。
global.whyImportant: 该事件反映了澳大利亚政坛在移民和种族议题上的激烈博弈及其对选举格局的影响。

global.title: France becomes first EU country to officially ban social media for children
global.summary: France’s parliament on Tuesday approved a bill banning social media access for children under 15, making France the first European country to bar children from apps such as TikTok. President Emmanuel Macron has championed the ban as a flagship reform of his final term in office and pledged to enforce it by September. “France is leading the way in Europe when it comes to protecting our children and teenagers,” Macron said in a video posted on social media, hailing “a major step forward”. He...
global.titleZh: 法国成为首个正式禁止儿童使用社交媒体的欧盟国家
global.summaryZh: 法国议会批准了一项法案，禁止15岁以下儿童使用TikTok等社交媒体平台。法国总统马克龙将此视为保护青少年的重要改革，并承诺在9月前落实执行。
global.whyImportant: 此举标志着欧洲在加强未成年人网络保护和监管方面迈出了具有里程碑意义的一步。

global.title: Iran war live: US launches new attacks; Hegseth says war has cost $37.5bn
global.summary: Trump threatens to bomb a suspected Iranian nuclear site called Pickaxe Mountain 'very heavily'.
global.titleZh: 伊朗战争直播：美国发动新一轮袭击；赫格塞斯称战争已耗资375亿美元
global.summaryZh: 特朗普威胁称将对伊朗一处名为“镐山”的疑似核设施进行“猛烈”轰炸。目前美伊冲突持续升级，引发国际关注。
global.whyImportant: 美伊冲突的加剧不仅威胁地区安全，还对全球能源市场和地缘政治稳定造成了严重冲击。

global.title: Wreckage of Pan Am plane found decades after crash that changed aviation safety
global.summary: Searchers have found the wreckage from a Pan Am flight that plunged into the ocean off Puerto Rico in 1952, an accident that killed 52 and led to requirements for the passenger safety briefings given on every commercial flight. The plane, the Clipper Endeavor, made a hard landing after losing engine power shortly after take-off. The 17 passengers and crew who survived told investigators everyone lived through the landing, but panic set in as many passengers struggled to find life vests and the...

global.title: How armed group alliances are reshaping Mali’s conflict and the wider Sahel
global.summary: A deadly attack near Anefis exposes the growing challenges facing Mali's military leaders.
global.titleZh: 武装团体联盟如何重塑马里的冲突及更广泛的萨赫勒地区
global.summaryZh: 阿内菲斯附近发生的一起致命袭击事件，凸显了马里军事领导人面临的日益严峻的挑战。武装团体的势力重组正在改变该地区的冲突格局。
global.whyImportant: 萨赫勒地区安全局势的恶化对当地政治稳定及国际反恐努力构成了持续威胁。

global.title: US military identifies third service member killed in Iranian attack on Jordan base
global.summary: Sgt Angel S Pampersad also believed to be dead in attack that killed two others, raising death toll to 18 troops since start of Iran war The US military has confirmed that a third service member is believed to be dead in Friday’s attack on a base in Jordan and identified them as Sgt Angel S Rampersad, 28, of New York. The confirmation brings the death toll to 18 US service members killed since the war began. Continue reading...
global.titleZh: 美军确认第三名在伊朗对约旦基地袭击中丧生的服役人员身份
global.summaryZh: 美军确认28岁的安吉尔·S·兰帕萨德中士在约旦基地的袭击中丧生，使美伊冲突爆发以来的美军死亡人数升至18人。该事件进一步加剧了美伊之间的紧张关系。
global.whyImportant: 美军伤亡人数的增加加大了美国政府在应对伊朗冲突方面的国内政治压力。

global.title: Leopard caught on camera storming into a store in Rajasthan, India
global.summary: A leopard storms into a store in Rajasthan, India, attacking an employee and causing panic.
tags: 专题·气候、环境与公共安全

global.title: China Merchants Securities drops South Korea ETF as Seoul stock volatility spills over
global.summary: A leading Chinese brokerage house has ended market making for the mainland’s only South Korea-focused exchange-traded fund (ETF), as Beijing steps up efforts to stabilise its capital markets and protect retail investors amid volatility in its East Asian neighbour’s stock market. Shenzhen-headquartered China Merchants Securities withdrew as a liquidity provider for the Huatai-PineBridge China-Korea Semiconductor ETF barely a month after assuming the role on June 17, according to Shanghai Stock...
global.titleZh: 招商证券放弃韩国ETF，首尔股市波动波及中国市场
global.summaryZh: 招商证券已停止为中国内地唯一的韩国主题ETF提供做市服务。此举旨在应对韩国股市波动，并配合北京稳定资本市场及保护投资者的努力。
global.whyImportant: 这显示了区域金融市场波动对跨境投资产品流动性和风险管理带来的直接影响。

global.title: RBA now twice as likely to hike interest rates as US-Iran war drives fuel prices higher
global.summary: Experts warn global energy market at a ‘critical juncture’ with escalating Middle East crisis expected to further drag on a slowing Australian economy Follow our Australia news live blog for latest updates Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast The likelihood of a Reserve Bank interest rate hike has doubled, according to market forecasts, as the escalating Middle East crisis once again drives fuel prices higher amid dwindling global oil reserves. The total breakdown in the fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran has sent the international Brent crude benchmark surging by 23% over the past two weeks and back within reach of $US90 a barrel. Continue reading...
global.titleZh: 美伊战争推高燃油价格，澳联储加息可能性翻倍
global.summaryZh: 受中东危机升级影响，全球能源市场动荡，布伦特原油价格飙升。市场预测澳大利亚储备银行加息的可能性已翻倍，这对放缓的澳大利亚经济构成压力。
global.whyImportant: 地缘政治冲突引发的能源价格上涨正通过通胀压力影响全球货币政策走向。

global.title: Perth teenager charged with murdering his mother and attempting to kill sister
global.summary: Police found woman dead in Bentley home and seriously injured girl on nearby highway Follow our Australia news live blog for latest updates Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast A teenage boy has been charged with murder after he allegedly killed his mother with a knife and stabbed his little sister, who managed to flee to get help. The 16-year-old boy was charged on Wednesday with one count of murder and one count of attempting to unlawfully kill after police attended a home at Bentley, in Perth’s south-east, on Tuesday morning. Continue reading...
global.titleZh: 珀斯一名青少年被控谋杀母亲并试图杀害其妹妹
global.summaryZh: 一名16岁少年因涉嫌持刀杀害母亲并刺伤妹妹被捕。警方已对其提起谋杀及蓄意谋杀未遂的指控。
global.whyImportant: 这起家庭悲剧引发了社会对青少年心理健康及家庭暴力预防的广泛关注。

At least 27 people were trapped, including some who entered the tunnel to help with rescue...

china.title: Can the US and its allies break China’s grip on rare earths and AI technology?
china.summary: The struggle between the US and China over who will lead in artificial intelligence is one of the defining competitions of our time. In the second part of our exclusive interview with a key player defining Washington’s policy on AI, Jacob Helberg, US undersecretary of state for economic affairs, discusses America’s efforts to rally its allies and cut dependence on China by securing alternative rare earth and critical mineral supply chains. By the time US President Donald Trump signed his...
china.titleZh: 美国及其盟友能否打破中国在稀土和人工智能技术上的垄断？
china.summaryZh: 美国正致力于联合盟友，通过确保稀土和关键矿产供应链的安全，减少对中国的依赖。这是美中在人工智能领域竞争的核心战略之一。
china.whyImportant: 关键矿产和高科技供应链的争夺已成为大国博弈的核心领域，影响全球产业布局。

china.titleZh: 中国的政策蓝图助力电动汽车行业崛起，其他国家能否效仿？
china.summaryZh: 中国电动汽车行业的成功得益于多方面的政策支持。目前全球正关注中国模式是否能为其他发展中国家提供产业升级的参考路径。

china.title: China’s missile test exposes lack of unity among Pacific island nations
china.summary: Pacific island nations are facing a security challenge in responding to China’s recent missile launch near Tuvalu and keeping their vision of a region as an “ocean of peace”, as analysts say the diverse nature of their ties with Beijing is complicating efforts towards a united response. On July 6, China said one of its navy’s nuclear submarines launched a “strategic missile” carrying a dummy warhead towards “relevant high seas of the Pacific Ocean”, describing the test as routine annual military...
china.titleZh: 中国导弹试验暴露太平洋岛国缺乏统一立场
china.summaryZh: 中国近期在太平洋进行的导弹试验引发了岛国对地区安全的担忧。由于各国与北京的关系复杂多样，岛国在应对此类事件时难以达成统一回应。
china.whyImportant: 这凸显了太平洋岛国在处理大国竞争与地区安全议题时的外交困境。

usa.title: Trump announces new tariffs on generic drugs to take effect in 2028 – as it happened
usa.summary: This live blog is now closed. Sign up for US Breaking News email US gas prices have continued to rise since the conflict with Iran resumed this month. According to the American Automobile Association (AAA), a gallon of fuel is now just over $4 – almost a dollar more than a year ago. It comes as Brent Crude, the international oil benchmark, is now up by almost 2% to $90.92 a barrel. Continue reading...
usa.titleZh: 特朗普宣布对仿制药征收新关税，将于2028年生效
usa.summaryZh: 随着美伊冲突持续，美国燃油价格不断上涨，布伦特原油价格已突破每桶90美元。在此背景下，特朗普政府宣布了针对仿制药的关税政策。
usa.whyImportant: 关税政策的调整可能对医疗成本和通胀水平产生长期影响。

usa.title: US war in Iran has cost US$37.5 billion so far, Pentagon chief Hegseth says
usa.summary: The cost of the United States’ war in Iran has risen to US$37.5 billion so far, US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth said on Tuesday, as he faced sceptical lawmakers for the first time since heavy bombings resumed to seek urgent funding for the unpopular conflict. With just six months before midterm elections in which US President Donald Trump’s Republicans may face an uphill battle to keep their House of ‌Representatives and Senate majorities, Democrats are riding high in public opinion polls as...
usa.titleZh: 美国防长赫格塞斯称，美伊战争迄今已耗资375亿美元
usa.summaryZh: 美国国防部长赫格塞斯在寻求额外战争拨款时透露，美伊冲突已耗资375亿美元。随着中期选举临近，该战争的经济成本引发了国会的激烈辩论。
usa.whyImportant: 战争的高昂代价正成为影响美国国内政治和选举结果的关键变量。

usa.title: Hegseth tells Senate war on Iran has so far cost $37.5bn at hearing to request more funds
usa.summary: Defense secretary has asked Senate appropriations committee for nearly $88bn more to continue effort The US defense secretary, Pete Hegseth told the Senate on Tuesday that the US-Israel war on Iran had cost $37.5bn so far, as he faced lawmakers furious over the conflict’s soaring price tag and the deaths last week of three American service members. During an appearance before the Senate appropriations committee, Hegseth, whose opening remarks were repeatedly interrupted by protesters, provided an updated account of the war’s cost – up from previous estimates – and defended the Trump administration’s roughly $88bn supplemental funding request, calling it “urgent, necessary”. Continue reading...
usa.titleZh: 赫格塞斯在听证会上向参议院表示，对伊战争已耗资375亿美元，并请求更多资金
usa.summaryZh: 美国防长赫格塞斯向参议院拨款委员会申请额外880亿美元资金，以维持对伊军事行动。尽管面临议员对战争成本和美军伤亡的强烈质疑，他仍坚称拨款至关重要。
usa.whyImportant: 政府对战争资金的迫切需求与国会内部的反对声音，反映了美国在处理该冲突时的政治分歧。

usa.title: US claims of Cuba’s ‘unique threat’ jar with reality of hunger and blackouts
usa.summary: State department’s 100-page report is latest push in Trump administration campaign to bring down government The US government’s latest allegations that Cuba is behind “many of the most significant upheavals in recent American political history” and that its leaders pose “a unique threat to American homeland security” have come as startling revelations to those living under the six-month-long US oil blockade in Havana, where desperate people search through piles of uncollected rubbish for food, or else swelter at home in 24-hour-plus blackouts. The unsigned 100-page report, Cuba: Capital of 21st-Century Communism, published by the US state department on Monday, blames Havana for everything from “the George Floyd riots to the rise of antifa to the explosion of pro-terrorist activism on American college campuses”. Continue reading...
usa.titleZh: 美国关于古巴“独特威胁”的说法与当地饥饿和停电的现实不符
usa.summaryZh: 美国国务院发布报告指责古巴威胁美国安全，但这一说法与古巴国内因长期封锁导致的物资匮乏和电力短缺现状形成鲜明对比。报告将美国国内的社会动荡归咎于古巴政府。
usa.whyImportant: 美古关系的持续紧张及其对古巴民生的影响，引发了国际社会对美国外交政策合理性的讨论。

usa.title: What’s at stake as Beijing beats global peers with first approval of novel therapy
usa.summary: China’s drug regulator has for the first time approved a novel, globally trialled medicine ahead of authorities in the United States, Japan and Europe, marking a “historic breakthrough” as the country doubles down on biopharmaceuticals as one of its growth engines. The drug was filed for market approval in multiple countries, and “China was the first in the world to approve it”, Xu Xiaoqiang, head of chemical drugs registration at the National Medical Products Administration (NMPA), told state...
usa.titleZh: 中国率先批准创新疗法，全球领先地位引发关注
usa.summaryZh: 中国药监部门首次在美日欧之前批准了一款全球临床试验的新药。这被视为中国生物医药产业发展的历史性突破，标志着其正成为全球医药创新的重要引擎。
usa.whyImportant: 中国在医药审批和创新方面的进展，显示了其在生物医药领域竞争力的显著提升。

watch.title: Trump administration attacks US left, alleging Cuba ties: Key takeaways
watch.summary: US report says the beleaguered government in Havana is the 'connective tissue' of a global 'anti-American coalition'.
watch.titleZh: 特朗普政府攻击美国左翼，指控其与古巴有联系：关键要点
watch.summaryZh: 美国一份最新报告称，古巴政府是全球“反美联盟”的核心。报告试图将美国国内的政治抗议活动与古巴联系起来，引发了广泛争议。
watch.whyImportant: 将国内政治对手与外国势力挂钩的叙事，加剧了美国国内的政治极化。

watch.title: Anas Sarwar reportedly set to quit as Scottish Labour leader to be minister in Andy Burnham’s government – as it happened
watch.summary: Sarwar expected to be elevated to Lords to take up a ministerial post at revamped Department for Business, Innovation, Science and Trade Burnham to cut VAT on electricity bills in first cost-of-living move António Costa, the president of the European council, said in a post on X that he held a “good” phone call with Andy Burnham last night, in which he said they agreed to “further strengthen” EU-UK relations and continue to cooperate to support Ukraine. He said there was also discussion about “common geopolitical challenges facing Europe”, which could be a reference to many things, including energy prices soaring due to the US-Israel war on Iran, Europe’s trading and security relationship with Washington, the future of Nato, the continent facing a wave of hybrid warfare, driven by Russia, or the surge of national populism and backlash against immigration. Continue reading...
watch.titleZh: 据报道，阿纳斯·萨瓦尔将辞去苏格兰工党领袖职务，加入安迪·伯纳姆政府担任部长
watch.summaryZh: 萨瓦尔预计将进入上议院并担任商业、创新、科学和贸易部部长。与此同时，伯纳姆政府正致力于通过削减电费增值税等措施应对生活成本危机。
watch.whyImportant: 英国政坛的人事变动及政策调整，反映了新政府在应对经济挑战和地缘政治压力方面的优先事项。

watch.title: Houthis threaten to attack shipping tankers if they use Saudi Arabian ports on Red Sea
watch.summary: Warning to shipping companies, on top of Iran’s chokehold on strait of Hormuz, may severely affect Saudi oil exports Middle East crisis live – latest updates Yemen’s Iranian-aligned Houthis have warned shipping companies that their tankers risk being attacked if they use Saudi Arabian ports, as the militia moved quickly to enforce a blockade announced the previous day. The Houthi warning for the Red Sea, coming on top of Iran’s threat to shipping on the other side of the Arabian peninsular in the Gulf, could affect the substantial Saudi oil exports that have so far been unscathed by the months-long conflict and deepen the rapidly escalating crisis in the region. Continue reading...
watch.titleZh: 胡塞武装威胁称，若油轮使用沙特红海港口将对其发动袭击
watch.summaryZh: 也门胡塞武装警告称，使用沙特港口的油轮将面临袭击风险。此举可能严重影响沙特石油出口，并进一步加剧红海地区的紧张局势。
watch.whyImportant: 海上航运安全受威胁将直接冲击全球能源供应，使中东危机的影响范围进一步扩大。

items.title: India tunnel disaster at hydropower project leaves 11 dead, 14 missing
items.summary: A suspected gas explosion on Monday triggered a collapse inside a tunnel that was under construction at a hydropower project in India’s northeastern Himalayan state of Sikkim, leaving at least 11 people dead and 14 missing, officials said on Tuesday. State Chief Minister Prem Singh Tamang, who visited the disaster site near the Chinese border, said the explosion was triggered by a build-up of methane gas. At least 27 people were trapped, including some who entered the tunnel to help with rescue...
tags: 专题·气候、环境与公共安全
items.titleZh: 印度水电项目隧道灾难造成11人死亡，14人失踪
items.summaryZh: 印度锡金邦一处在建水电项目隧道因甲烷气体堆积引发爆炸并坍塌。目前救援工作仍在进行，事故已造成重大人员伤亡。
items.whyImportant: 该事故暴露了大型基础设施建设中的安全隐患及地质灾害风险管理问题。

items.title: China’s policy playbook took its EV sector from zero to hero – can other countries follow?
items.summary: China’s electric vehicle (EV) industry sits at the centre of numerous economic and geopolitical trends: consumer spending, environmental protection, trade policy, high-end manufacturing, technology and more. In this short series, we assess the current state of the sector within these broader contexts. Here, Yeon Woo Lee asks whether Beijing has written a blueprint for developing countries to kick-start their own contenders in the field. Emerging markets once seemed like also-rans in the global...
tags: 专题·气候、环境与公共安全
items.titleZh: 中国的政策蓝图助力电动汽车行业崛起，其他国家能否效仿？
items.summaryZh: 中国电动汽车行业的成功得益于多方面的政策支持。目前全球正关注中国模式是否能为其他发展中国家提供产业升级的参考路径。
items.whyImportant: 中国在电动汽车领域的领先地位正促使各国重新评估其产业政策和全球贸易战略。

items.title: Wreckage of Pan Am plane found decades after crash that changed aviation safety
items.summary: Searchers have found the wreckage from a Pan Am flight that plunged into the ocean off Puerto Rico in 1952, an accident that killed 52 and led to requirements for the passenger safety briefings given on every commercial flight. The plane, the Clipper Endeavor, made a hard landing after losing engine power shortly after take-off. The 17 passengers and crew who survived told investigators everyone lived through the landing, but panic set in as many passengers struggled to find life vests and the...
tags: 专题·气候、环境与公共安全
items.titleZh: 泛美航空客机残骸在坠毁数十年后被发现，该事故曾改变航空安全标准
items.summaryZh: 搜寻人员发现了1952年在波多黎各附近海域坠毁的泛美航空客机残骸。该事故造成52人死亡，并直接推动了现代商业航班乘客安全简报制度的建立。
items.whyImportant: 这一发现揭开了航空史上重要事故的真相，并提醒人们航空安全规范的演变历程。

items.title: Leopard caught on camera storming into a store in Rajasthan, India
items.summary: A leopard storms into a store in Rajasthan, India, attacking an employee and causing panic.
tags: 专题·气候、环境与公共安全
items.titleZh: 印度拉贾斯坦邦一家商店内豹子闯入监控画面曝光
items.summaryZh: 印度拉贾斯坦邦一家商店突然闯入一只豹子，袭击了一名员工并引发恐慌。目前相关部门正在处理此类野生动物进入人类居住区的事件。
items.whyImportant: 该事件反映了野生动物栖息地减少导致的人兽冲突问题日益突出。

items.title: Hong Kong surpasses July rainfall in just 20 days – why?
items.summary: Hong Kong’s rainfall so far this month has already surpassed typical levels for July by 23 per cent, a review of Observatory data shows, with a meteorologist warning the city will experience more extreme downpours due to global warming. The Observatory also said on Tuesday that Hong Kong would be hit by rainstorms again over the weekend following weeks of heavy rain as a tropical cyclone neared the city. A South China Morning Post reporter reviewed the forecaster’s data and found the city...
tags: 专题·气候、环境与公共安全
items.titleZh: 香港20天内降雨量超7月平均值，原因何在？
items.summaryZh: 香港本月降雨量已比往年7月平均水平高出23%。气象专家警告，受全球变暖影响，未来极端暴雨天气将更加频繁。
items.whyImportant: 气候变化带来的极端天气正对城市基础设施和公共安全提出严峻挑战。

items.title: Australia news live: Brittany Higgins accuses Hanson of victim-blaming in ‘atrocious’ comments on domestic violence
items.summary: Follow today’s news live Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast The New South Wales premier, Chris Minns, says the state’s Labor party is under threat from One Nation and “we’ve got to fight for those votes”. Appearing on ABC Radio National this morning, Minns was asked if One Nation was a “racist party”. He said people who had concerns about the levels of immigration weren’t necessarily racist but some of the things Pauline Hanson had said were. Certainly some of the things Pauline Hanson says are definitely racist, when she said there’s no such thing as a good Muslim. I mean, how else do you characterise that? You’ve got to be straight with people. And that clearly is. But I don’t think everyone who’s supporting them currently is racist at all … And we’ve got to fight for those votes. I think that we are under threat in a whole bunch of seats as a result of the surge of votes for One Nation … So we’re doing some what we regard as practical commonsense changes to policy in New South Wales. When people join the Do Not Call Register or unsubscribe from marketing messages, they are making a clear choice. Those choices must be respected – especially given the heig
items.titleZh: 澳大利亚新闻直播：布列塔尼·希金斯指责汉森在家庭暴力问题上的“恶劣”言论是受害者有罪论
items.summaryZh: 新南威尔士州州长克里斯·明斯表示，工党正面临“一族党”的选票威胁，必须积极争取选民。明斯指出，虽然并非所有支持该党的人都是种族主义者，但宝琳·汉森的部分言论确实带有明显的种族主义色彩。
items.whyImportant: 该事件反映了澳大利亚政坛在移民和种族议题上的激烈博弈及其对选举格局的影响。

items.title: France becomes first EU country to officially ban social media for children
items.summary: France’s parliament on Tuesday approved a bill banning social media access for children under 15, making France the first European country to bar children from apps such as TikTok. President Emmanuel Macron has championed the ban as a flagship reform of his final term in office and pledged to enforce it by September. “France is leading the way in Europe when it comes to protecting our children and teenagers,” Macron said in a video posted on social media, hailing “a major step forward”. He...
items.titleZh: 法国成为首个正式禁止儿童使用社交媒体的欧盟国家
items.summaryZh: 法国议会批准了一项法案，禁止15岁以下儿童使用TikTok等社交媒体平台。法国总统马克龙将此视为保护青少年的重要改革，并承诺在9月前落实执行。
items.whyImportant: 此举标志着欧洲在加强未成年人网络保护和监管方面迈出了具有里程碑意义的一步。

items.title: Iran war live: US launches new attacks; Hegseth says war has cost $37.5bn
items.summary: Trump threatens to bomb a suspected Iranian nuclear site called Pickaxe Mountain 'very heavily'.
items.titleZh: 伊朗战争直播：美国发动新一轮袭击；赫格塞斯称战争已耗资375亿美元
items.summaryZh: 特朗普威胁称将对伊朗一处名为“镐山”的疑似核设施进行“猛烈”轰炸。目前美伊冲突持续升级，引发国际关注。
items.whyImportant: 美伊冲突的加剧不仅威胁地区安全，还对全球能源市场和地缘政治稳定造成了严重冲击。

items.title: How armed group alliances are reshaping Mali’s conflict and the wider Sahel
items.summary: A deadly attack near Anefis exposes the growing challenges facing Mali's military leaders.
items.titleZh: 武装团体联盟如何重塑马里的冲突及更广泛的萨赫勒地区
items.summaryZh: 阿内菲斯附近发生的一起致命袭击事件，凸显了马里军事领导人面临的日益严峻的挑战。武装团体的势力重组正在改变该地区的冲突格局。
items.whyImportant: 萨赫勒地区安全局势的恶化对当地政治稳定及国际反恐努力构成了持续威胁。

items.title: US military identifies third service member killed in Iranian attack on Jordan base
items.summary: Sgt Angel S Pampersad also believed to be dead in attack that killed two others, raising death toll to 18 troops since start of Iran war The US military has confirmed that a third service member is believed to be dead in Friday’s attack on a base in Jordan and identified them as Sgt Angel S Rampersad, 28, of New York. The confirmation brings the death toll to 18 US service members killed since the war began. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 美军确认第三名在伊朗对约旦基地袭击中丧生的服役人员身份
items.summaryZh: 美军确认28岁的安吉尔·S·兰帕萨德中士在约旦基地的袭击中丧生，使美伊冲突爆发以来的美军死亡人数升至18人。该事件进一步加剧了美伊之间的紧张关系。
items.whyImportant: 美军伤亡人数的增加加大了美国政府在应对伊朗冲突方面的国内政治压力。

items.title: China Merchants Securities drops South Korea ETF as Seoul stock volatility spills over
items.summary: A leading Chinese brokerage house has ended market making for the mainland’s only South Korea-focused exchange-traded fund (ETF), as Beijing steps up efforts to stabilise its capital markets and protect retail investors amid volatility in its East Asian neighbour’s stock market. Shenzhen-headquartered China Merchants Securities withdrew as a liquidity provider for the Huatai-PineBridge China-Korea Semiconductor ETF barely a month after assuming the role on June 17, according to Shanghai Stock...
items.titleZh: 招商证券放弃韩国ETF，首尔股市波动波及中国市场
items.summaryZh: 招商证券已停止为中国内地唯一的韩国主题ETF提供做市服务。此举旨在应对韩国股市波动，并配合北京稳定资本市场及保护投资者的努力。
items.whyImportant: 这显示了区域金融市场波动对跨境投资产品流动性和风险管理带来的直接影响。

items.title: RBA now twice as likely to hike interest rates as US-Iran war drives fuel prices higher
items.summary: Experts warn global energy market at a ‘critical juncture’ with escalating Middle East crisis expected to further drag on a slowing Australian economy Follow our Australia news live blog for latest updates Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast The likelihood of a Reserve Bank interest rate hike has doubled, according to market forecasts, as the escalating Middle East crisis once again drives fuel prices higher amid dwindling global oil reserves. The total breakdown in the fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran has sent the international Brent crude benchmark surging by 23% over the past two weeks and back within reach of $US90 a barrel. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 美伊战争推高燃油价格，澳联储加息可能性翻倍
items.summaryZh: 受中东危机升级影响，全球能源市场动荡，布伦特原油价格飙升。市场预测澳大利亚储备银行加息的可能性已翻倍，这对放缓的澳大利亚经济构成压力。
items.whyImportant: 地缘政治冲突引发的能源价格上涨正通过通胀压力影响全球货币政策走向。

items.title: Perth teenager charged with murdering his mother and attempting to kill sister
items.summary: Police found woman dead in Bentley home and seriously injured girl on nearby highway Follow our Australia news live blog for latest updates Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast A teenage boy has been charged with murder after he allegedly killed his mother with a knife and stabbed his little sister, who managed to flee to get help. The 16-year-old boy was charged on Wednesday with one count of murder and one count of attempting to unlawfully kill after police attended a home at Bentley, in Perth’s south-east, on Tuesday morning. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 珀斯一名青少年被控谋杀母亲并试图杀害其妹妹
items.summaryZh: 一名16岁少年因涉嫌持刀杀害母亲并刺伤妹妹被捕。警方已对其提起谋杀及蓄意谋杀未遂的指控。
items.whyImportant: 这起家庭悲剧引发了社会对青少年心理健康及家庭暴力预防的广泛关注。

items.title: Can the US and its allies break China’s grip on rare earths and AI technology?
items.summary: The struggle between the US and China over who will lead in artificial intelligence is one of the defining competitions of our time. In the second part of our exclusive interview with a key player defining Washington’s policy on AI, Jacob Helberg, US undersecretary of state for economic affairs, discusses America’s efforts to rally its allies and cut dependence on China by securing alternative rare earth and critical mineral supply chains. By the time US President Donald Trump signed his...
items.titleZh: 美国及其盟友能否打破中国在稀土和人工智能技术上的垄断？
items.summaryZh: 美国正致力于联合盟友，通过确保稀土和关键矿产供应链的安全，减少对中国的依赖。这是美中在人工智能领域竞争的核心战略之一。
items.whyImportant: 关键矿产和高科技供应链的争夺已成为大国博弈的核心领域，影响全球产业布局。

items.title: China’s missile test exposes lack of unity among Pacific island nations
items.summary: Pacific island nations are facing a security challenge in responding to China’s recent missile launch near Tuvalu and keeping their vision of a region as an “ocean of peace”, as analysts say the diverse nature of their ties with Beijing is complicating efforts towards a united response. On July 6, China said one of its navy’s nuclear submarines launched a “strategic missile” carrying a dummy warhead towards “relevant high seas of the Pacific Ocean”, describing the test as routine annual military...
items.titleZh: 中国导弹试验暴露太平洋岛国缺乏统一立场
items.summaryZh: 中国近期在太平洋进行的导弹试验引发了岛国对地区安全的担忧。由于各国与北京的关系复杂多样，岛国在应对此类事件时难以达成统一回应。
items.whyImportant: 这凸显了太平洋岛国在处理大国竞争与地区安全议题时的外交困境。

items.title: Trump announces new tariffs on generic drugs to take effect in 2028 – as it happened
items.summary: This live blog is now closed. Sign up for US Breaking News email US gas prices have continued to rise since the conflict with Iran resumed this month. According to the American Automobile Association (AAA), a gallon of fuel is now just over $4 – almost a dollar more than a year ago. It comes as Brent Crude, the international oil benchmark, is now up by almost 2% to $90.92 a barrel. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 特朗普宣布对仿制药征收新关税，将于2028年生效
items.summaryZh: 随着美伊冲突持续，美国燃油价格不断上涨，布伦特原油价格已突破每桶90美元。在此背景下，特朗普政府宣布了针对仿制药的关税政策。
items.whyImportant: 关税政策的调整可能对医疗成本和通胀水平产生长期影响。

items.title: US war in Iran has cost US$37.5 billion so far, Pentagon chief Hegseth says
items.summary: The cost of the United States’ war in Iran has risen to US$37.5 billion so far, US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth said on Tuesday, as he faced sceptical lawmakers for the first time since heavy bombings resumed to seek urgent funding for the unpopular conflict. With just six months before midterm elections in which US President Donald Trump’s Republicans may face an uphill battle to keep their House of ‌Representatives and Senate majorities, Democrats are riding high in public opinion polls as...
items.titleZh: 美国防长赫格塞斯称，美伊战争迄今已耗资375亿美元
items.summaryZh: 美国国防部长赫格塞斯在寻求额外战争拨款时透露，美伊冲突已耗资375亿美元。随着中期选举临近，该战争的经济成本引发了国会的激烈辩论。
items.whyImportant: 战争的高昂代价正成为影响美国国内政治和选举结果的关键变量。

items.title: Hegseth tells Senate war on Iran has so far cost $37.5bn at hearing to request more funds
items.summary: Defense secretary has asked Senate appropriations committee for nearly $88bn more to continue effort The US defense secretary, Pete Hegseth told the Senate on Tuesday that the US-Israel war on Iran had cost $37.5bn so far, as he faced lawmakers furious over the conflict’s soaring price tag and the deaths last week of three American service members. During an appearance before the Senate appropriations committee, Hegseth, whose opening remarks were repeatedly interrupted by protesters, provided an updated account of the war’s cost – up from previous estimates – and defended the Trump administration’s roughly $88bn supplemental funding request, calling it “urgent, necessary”. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 赫格塞斯在听证会上向参议院表示，对伊战争已耗资375亿美元，并请求更多资金
items.summaryZh: 美国防长赫格塞斯向参议院拨款委员会申请额外880亿美元资金，以维持对伊军事行动。尽管面临议员对战争成本和美军伤亡的强烈质疑，他仍坚称拨款至关重要。
items.whyImportant: 政府对战争资金的迫切需求与国会内部的反对声音，反映了美国在处理该冲突时的政治分歧。

items.title: US claims of Cuba’s ‘unique threat’ jar with reality of hunger and blackouts
items.summary: State department’s 100-page report is latest push in Trump administration campaign to bring down government The US government’s latest allegations that Cuba is behind “many of the most significant upheavals in recent American political history” and that its leaders pose “a unique threat to American homeland security” have come as startling revelations to those living under the six-month-long US oil blockade in Havana, where desperate people search through piles of uncollected rubbish for food, or else swelter at home in 24-hour-plus blackouts. The unsigned 100-page report, Cuba: Capital of 21st-Century Communism, published by the US state department on Monday, blames Havana for everything from “the George Floyd riots to the rise of antifa to the explosion of pro-terrorist activism on American college campuses”. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 美国关于古巴“独特威胁”的说法与当地饥饿和停电的现实不符
items.summaryZh: 美国国务院发布报告指责古巴威胁美国安全，但这一说法与古巴国内因长期封锁导致的物资匮乏和电力短缺现状形成鲜明对比。报告将美国国内的社会动荡归咎于古巴政府。
items.whyImportant: 美古关系的持续紧张及其对古巴民生的影响，引发了国际社会对美国外交政策合理性的讨论。

items.title: What’s at stake as Beijing beats global peers with first approval of novel therapy
items.summary: China’s drug regulator has for the first time approved a novel, globally trialled medicine ahead of authorities in the United States, Japan and Europe, marking a “historic breakthrough” as the country doubles down on biopharmaceuticals as one of its growth engines. The drug was filed for market approval in multiple countries, and “China was the first in the world to approve it”, Xu Xiaoqiang, head of chemical drugs registration at the National Medical Products Administration (NMPA), told state...
items.titleZh: 中国率先批准创新疗法，全球领先地位引发关注
items.summaryZh: 中国药监部门首次在美日欧之前批准了一款全球临床试验的新药。这被视为中国生物医药产业发展的历史性突破，标志着其正成为全球医药创新的重要引擎。
items.whyImportant: 中国在医药审批和创新方面的进展，显示了其在生物医药领域竞争力的显著提升。

items.title: Trump administration attacks US left, alleging Cuba ties: Key takeaways
items.summary: US report says the beleaguered government in Havana is the 'connective tissue' of a global 'anti-American coalition'.
items.titleZh: 特朗普政府攻击美国左翼，指控其与古巴有联系：关键要点
items.summaryZh: 美国一份最新报告称，古巴政府是全球“反美联盟”的核心。报告试图将美国国内的政治抗议活动与古巴联系起来，引发了广泛争议。
items.whyImportant: 将国内政治对手与外国势力挂钩的叙事，加剧了美国国内的政治极化。

items.title: Anas Sarwar reportedly set to quit as Scottish Labour leader to be minister in Andy Burnham’s government – as it happened
items.summary: Sarwar expected to be elevated to Lords to take up a ministerial post at revamped Department for Business, Innovation, Science and Trade Burnham to cut VAT on electricity bills in first cost-of-living move António Costa, the president of the European council, said in a post on X that he held a “good” phone call with Andy Burnham last night, in which he said they agreed to “further strengthen” EU-UK relations and continue to cooperate to support Ukraine. He said there was also discussion about “common geopolitical challenges facing Europe”, which could be a reference to many things, including energy prices soaring due to the US-Israel war on Iran, Europe’s trading and security relationship with Washington, the future of Nato, the continent facing a wave of hybrid warfare, driven by Russia, or the surge of national populism and backlash against immigration. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 据报道，阿纳斯·萨瓦尔将辞去苏格兰工党领袖职务，加入安迪·伯纳姆政府担任部长
items.summaryZh: 萨瓦尔预计将进入上议院并担任商业、创新、科学和贸易部部长。与此同时，伯纳姆政府正致力于通过削减电费增值税等措施应对生活成本危机。
items.whyImportant: 英国政坛的人事变动及政策调整，反映了新政府在应对经济挑战和地缘政治压力方面的优先事项。

items.title: Houthis threaten to attack shipping tankers if they use Saudi Arabian ports on Red Sea
items.summary: Warning to shipping companies, on top of Iran’s chokehold on strait of Hormuz, may severely affect Saudi oil exports Middle East crisis live – latest updates Yemen’s Iranian-aligned Houthis have warned shipping companies that their tankers risk being attacked if they use Saudi Arabian ports, as the militia moved quickly to enforce a blockade announced the previous day. The Houthi warning for the Red Sea, coming on top of Iran’s threat to shipping on the other side of the Arabian peninsular in the Gulf, could affect the substantial Saudi oil exports that have so far been unscathed by the months-long conflict and deepen the rapidly escalating crisis in the region. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 胡塞武装威胁称，若油轮使用沙特红海港口将对其发动袭击
items.summaryZh: 也门胡塞武装警告称，使用沙特港口的油轮将面临袭击风险。此举可能严重影响沙特石油出口，并进一步加剧红海地区的紧张局势。
items.whyImportant: 海上航运安全受威胁将直接冲击全球能源供应，使中东危机的影响范围进一步扩大。
